title: CA LCFS Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2024
content:
Key Takeaways

  • Overall credits rose 11.01% QoQ, driven by renewable diesel and Bio-CNG.
  • EV charging on residential grids saw a 5.42% increase in credits QoQ.
  • Total deficits decreased by 2.77%, but diesel volumes saw significant increases in Q3 2024 compared to previous quarter.
author: Mansift Kaur
